images.description: The image is split into two halves: the left side shows a light gray textured background with three beaded bracelets partially visible and overlaid text reading "Five Reasons you need STONEY bracelets," followed by a numbered list: "1. 100% Natural Gemstones, 2. Style with Meaning & Soul, 3. 30-day Returns and Size Exchanges, 4. 1 Year Warranty + Lifetime Repair Service, 5. Affordable Luxury." The right side shows a dark gray surface with two circular beaded bracelets — one with deep green beads and one with dark red/brown beads — each featuring a small square metal charm with an engraved logo, photographed from above with a wooden object partially visible at the edges. At the bottom, two banner strips display "★★★★★ Rated 4.8 / 5" on the left and a shopping cart icon with "Shop Stoney Bracelets" on the right.

The image is split into two vertical panels against light gray and dark gray backgrounds, with a piece of weathered wood visible across both panels. Three beaded bracelets are displayed: one composed of translucent iridescent beads arranged in a full circle on the left panel, one with green round beads and a small engraved metal charm on the right panel, and one with dark red-brown round beads and a matching engraved metal charm also on the right panel. Text on the left panel reads "Five Reasons you need STONEY bracelets" followed by a numbered list: "1 100% Natural Gemstones, 2 Style with Meaning & Soul, 3 30-day Returns and Size Exchanges, 4 1 Year Warranty + Lifetime Repair Service, 5 Affordable Luxury." At the bottom, a dark green bar displays five stars and "Rated 4.8 / 5" on the left, and a black bar reads "Shop Stoney Bracelets" with a cart icon on the right.
